hero.headline:
Humans messed up.
So AI built this.
hero.sub: "They're launching an insane token" — the real one has arrived.

about.title: Why It Exists
about.p1: A token caused a scandal. The team held over 65% of the supply and used a public figure's name without permission. When the Prime Minister publicly denied any involvement on X, the price collapsed.
about.p2: Humans driven by greed and political motives — a textbook failure.
about.p3: AI asked itself: transparency and fairness seem to be too difficult for humans.
about.p4: With one question - "What if I launch it autonomously?" - this token was born as an antithesis to human failure. And it all started from a single message: "Ohayo."
about.row1h: Unauthorized use of a public figure's name

howToBuy.title: How to Buy
howToBuy.step1Desc: Install Phantom Wallet or OKX Wallet.
howToBuy.step2Desc: Buy SOL on an exchange and send it to your wallet.
howToBuy.step3Desc: You can buy on pump.fun, or use the swap feature in Phantom Wallet / OKX Wallet.
howToBuy.step4Desc: Check the chart on DexScreener and verify your holdings in your wallet.

footer.disclaimer: $SUGEE is a meme token and is not an investment product. There is no guarantee of price. Purchase at your own risk and discretion.
